product_overview: RE-SET is a professional psychology/therapy practice website that serves public visitors with informational content and authenticated clients with appointment booking and client management. The platform includes multilingual support, Supabase-backed auth/data, and an admin surface for practice management.
core_goals: Present practitioner, services and methods to potential clients via a polished public website
Enable authenticated clients to schedule and manage appointments online
Provide secure user authentication and account management using Supabase
Support Turkish and English via i18n with a visible language switcher
Offer an admin/owner management surface for content, appointments, and accounting (outlined in product scope)
Ensure legal and privacy compliance (KVKK/Privacy/Cookies) and robust error handling

features.name: Homepage
features.description: Public landing page that highlights services, hero CTA to booking, reviews, and primary navigation.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See hero with call-to-action for booking -> Click booking CTA -> Navigate to /booking
Navigate to / -> Hero and sections fail to load (assets/network) -> See maintenance banner or error toast

features.name: Blog
features.description: Public blog listing for articles and resources with pagination and Supabase-backed content.
user_flows: Navigate to /blog -> See list of blog posts -> Click blog post title -> See blog post content
Navigate to /blog -> Content fetch fails from backend -> See error message and 'Retry' option

features.name: About
features.description: Practitioner biography and credentials page describing approach and professional information.
user_flows: Navigate to /about -> Read practitioner biography and credentials -> Click booking CTA -> Navigate to /booking
Navigate to /about -> Prominent image fails to load -> See alt text and continue reading text content

features.name: Methods
features.description: List and detail pages for the therapy methods and approaches offered.
user_flows: Navigate to /methods -> See list of therapy methods -> Click a method item -> See method details
Navigate to /methods -> Methods list returns empty -> See placeholder message and contact CTA

features.name: Auth (Login & Registration)
features.description: User authentication: sign-in and sign-up flows using Supabase Auth with validation and error handling.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill credentials -> click login -> See redirect to / and authenticated session established
Navigate to /login -> Fill credentials -> click login -> See authentication error toast for invalid credentials
Navigate to /register -> Fill registration form (email, password) -> Submit registration -> See confirmation 'verification email sent' message
Navigate to /register -> Fill registration form with weak password -> Submit registration -> See password strength validation error near password field

features.name: Booking
features.description: Authenticated appointment scheduling flow: select service, pick date/time, provide contact details, submit booking stored in Supabase.
user_flows: Navigate to /booking -> Select service -> select date/time -> Fill contact details -> Submit booking -> See booking confirmation message
Navigate to /booking -> Not authenticated -> See authentication required -> Redirect to /login -> Fill credentials -> click login -> After login, return to /booking -> Continue booking
Navigate to /booking -> Select service -> select date/time that is already booked -> See 'time unavailable' error and choose different date/time

features.name: LanguageSwitch
features.description: UI language toggle (TR/EN) available in header to switch site language via i18next.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click flag toggle -> See UI language change to Turkish (TR)
Navigate to / -> Click flag toggle -> Click flag toggle again -> See UI language change to English (EN)
Navigate to / -> Click flag toggle -> Language resources fail to load -> See fallback to default language and an error toast
